Call ID: EXT-011
Type: external
Date: 2026-03-18
Topic: Product Feedback
Participants: Liam (account manager); Owen (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Liam): Hi Owen, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Owen): My team keeps asking for a better mobile experience.
AM (Liam): Let me connect you with our product team for a feedback session.
Customer (Owen): That would help. Our leadership pays close attention to this.
AM (Liam): I'll flag the usability feedback; we're actively investing there.
Customer (Owen): Good conversation — send me that summary and we'll align internally.
AM (Liam): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
